recentActivity.action: Analyzed Alert #1089: Multiple failed Kerberos TGT requests from C4521 targeting 8 accounts, classified as credential-access/T1110 with confidence 0.96. Forwarded to Hunter Agent.

Investigating INV-2026-001: Traced authentication chain C102 → C4501 (Kerberos/Interactive) → C892 (NTLM/Network) → DC01 (Kerberos/TGS). 3-hop lateral movement confirmed. Temporal window: 4 minutes 23 seconds.

Cross-referenced INV-2026-001 against 847 historical FP patterns. No match found. Authentication chain timing and target selection inconsistent with legitimate administrative patterns. Verified as true positive.

Analyzed 12 new alerts in batch. 9 classified as Info/Low (routine service account activity), 2 classified as Medium (unusual logon times), 1 classified as High (new scheduled task on production server). Medium/High forwarded for investigation.

pendingApprovals.reason: Active DNS tunneling exfiltration detected — 234 events, estimated 52KB data exfiltrated
